zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Francis III於大約1376年出生在英國史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴時，他的父親Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV36歲，母親Cecily De Beaufoy33歲。他與Mrs Margaret Francis結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1417年享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可恩費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Francis III于大约1376年出生在英国史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴时，他的父亲Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV36岁，母亲Cecily De Beaufoy33岁。他与Mrs Margaret Francis结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1417年享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可恩費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Franceis, modern French François, from Latin Franciscus, originally ‘Frank’, though later used to denote a Frenchman. The personal name owed much of its popularity during the Middle Ages to the fame of Saint Francis of Assisi (1181–1226), whose baptismal name was actually Giovanni but who was nicknamed Francisco because his father was absent in France at the time of his birth. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Francesco and Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Franc , and also their derivatives, e.g. Croatian Francišković (see Francisco 4).
English: ethnic name from the Old French adjective Franceis ‘French’ (see 1 above).
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, or an adoption of the non-Jewish surname.

variants.name: Ferenc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Iwan, Zbigniew.
Hungarian, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Rusyn (from Slovakia and Poland), Slovenian, and Croatian: from the personal name Ferenc, a Hungarian form of Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Fraczek
meanings: Polish (Frączek): from a pet form of the personal name Franciszek, an equivalent of Latin Franciscus (see Francis ). It is found mainly in Lesser Poland.

variants.name: Chico
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jesus, Pedro, Rafael, Bernardo, Camilo, Cirilo, Juan, Miguel, Ramona, Ruben.
Spanish: from chico ‘small, young’ (of uncertain origin, perhaps from Latin ciccum ‘trifle’), applied as a nickname for a small man, or for the younger of two bearers of the same personal name.
Portuguese: from a pet form of the personal name Francisco, a vernacular form of Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Francesco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Gabriele, Giovanni, Pasquale, Rocco, Salvatore.  Spanish Carlota, Garcia, Romana.
Italian: from the personal name Francesco (from Latin Franciscus), an equivalent of Francis .

variants.name: Di Cicco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Pasquale, Carlo, Cosmo, Giovanni, Giulio, Giuseppe, Nicola, Attilio, Benedetto, Carmela.
Italian: patronymic from a pet form of the personal name Francesco, from Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Ceccarelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Dino, Angelo, Dante, Quinto, Sesto, Aldo, Americo, Amerigo, Arcangelo, Augusto, Aurelio, Franco, Gino, Guido, Italo, Leoncio, Renato, Roberto, Tino, Tito, Valerio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Ceccarello, a diminutive of Cecco, itself a diminutive Francesco, from Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Di Cioccio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Cosmo, Mario, Cesidio, Dante, Guido, Salvatore, Aldo, Americo, Benito, Biagio, Domenico, Ezio, Flavio, Nunzio, Quintino, Silverio.
Italian: patronymic from a personal name of uncertain derivation,possibly a pet form of Francesco (see Francis ).

variants.name: Cillo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Americo, Aniello, Antonio, Carmine, Gianna, Giovanni, Guido, Livio, Rocco, Vito.
Italian: from a shortened pet form of Francesco (equivalent of Francis ).

variants.name: Cisco
meanings: Italian (Veneto): from the personal name Cisco, a short form of Francesco, Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).
American shortened form of the surname   Francisco   (which is in part of German and presumably also of French origin) and thus a variant of   Sisco   and   Sesco  .

variants.name: Fran
meanings: Croatian: from a short form of local equivalents of the Latin personal name Franciscus (see Francis ).
Spanish: probably an altered form of Catalan   Franc  .
Hispanic (mainly Philippines): from a short form of the Spanish personal name   Franco   or   Francisco  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical. See Adam .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Francis III was born about 1376, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV, was 36 and his mother, Cecily De Beaufoy, was 33. He married Mrs Margaret Francis. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1417, at the age of 42, and was buried in Enfield, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Francis III est né environ 1376, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Cecily De Beaufoy, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Margaret Francis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1417, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Francis III um 1376 in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV 36 und seine Mutter Cecily De Beaufoy 33. Er hat Mrs Margaret Francis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1417 im Alter von 42 Jahren und wurde in Enfield, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Francis III è nato il circa 1376 nel Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Cecily De Beaufoy, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Margaret Francis. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1417, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Enfield, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Francis IIIが約1376年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチで生まれた時，父Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IVは36歳，母Cecily De Beaufoyは33歳であった。Mrs Margaret Francisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1417年に42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Francis III(이)가 대략 1376년 영국 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily De Beaufoy(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Mrs Margaret Francis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1417년 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Francis III nasceu aproximadamente 1376, em Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Cecily De Beaufoy, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Margaret Francis. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1417, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Francis III родился около 1376 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily De Beaufoy, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Margaret Francis. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1417 г. в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Francis III nació aproximadamente 1376, en Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Baron Robert Francis Francis of Foremark IV, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Cecily De Beaufoy, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Mrs Margaret Francis. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1417, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
